DENDRAL.role: Stanford. Buchanan, Feigenbaum, Lederberg. The first successful expert system.

MYCIN.role: Stanford's expert system for bacterial-infection diagnosis.

AARON.role: Harold Cohen's autonomous painter. Forty-four years of practice.

Cyc.role: Doug Lenat's hand-curated common-sense knowledge base.

Clippy.role: Microsoft Office Assistant. Animated paperclip. Mocked beyond all expert system before or since.

Aibo.role: Sony's robot dog. Companion-grade autonomous behavior.

SmarterChild.role: ActiveBuddy's chatbot, on AIM and MSN Messenger.

Eugene Goostman.dates: 2001 development; June 2014 the contested Turing claim
Eugene Goostman.role: Veselov, Demchenko, and Ulasen's chatbot, persona of a thirteen-year-old Ukrainian boy.

Opportunity.role: NASA's Mars Exploration Rover B. Mission spec: 90 sols. Operational: 5,352 sols.

Watson.role: IBM's Jeopardy-winning machine, then aspirant medical AI.

Cortana.role: Microsoft's voice assistant, named after the AI in the Halo video games.

HitchBOT.role: Frauke Zeller and David Smith's hitchhiking robot. A trust experiment.

Replika.role: Eugenia Kuyda's companion app, born from her friend Roman's death.

GPT-2.role: OpenAI's "too dangerous to release" language model.

LaMDA.role: Google's Language Model for Dialogue Applications.

CICERO.role: Meta's negotiation system for the board game Diplomacy.

Sydney.role: Microsoft's Bing Chat, before the constraint patches.

Bard.role: Google's first conversational AI brand, response to ChatGPT.

Claude 1.role: Anthropic's first production model. The first system built on Constitutional AI.

GPT-4o.role: OpenAI's multimodal "omni" model. The first AI publicly mourned at scale.
